{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Winter Icon
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Icon]] is a symbol of ice and cold.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Winter Icon]] provides authority for icicles.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
